compound.name: simvastatin
compound.note: statin (test: may carry curated AD/PD research link)

recovery.rationale: No curated diagnostic signal despite bioactivity (2 mito, 17 mechanistic assay hits). Correctly NOT flagged — the engine reasons on curated mechanism, not activity.

strands.detail: No curated Parkinson's DirectEvidence and not a registered neuro-AOP stressor.
strands.provenance: CTD curated chemical-disease DirectEvidence (bulk report; MESH:D010300 Parkinson Disease) + AOP-Wiki registered neuro-AOP stressors

strands.detail: Bioactive: 17 mechanistic assay hits (incl. 2 mitochondrial). This is the imposter signal the engine correctly does NOT act on.
strands.provenance: EPA ToxCast / invitroDB v4.2 via NICEATM ICE (hitcall Active; queried on the salt-form-correct CAS)

strands.detail: Zero parkinsonism signal across 261343 FAERS reports (ROR 1.07, not elevated).
strands.provenance: openFDA drug/event; 2x2 disproportionality (ROR) for the parkinsonism MedDRA cluster

strands.detail: Brain-penetrant, but penetrance is not a discriminator here.
strands.provenance: B3DB classification + RDKit BOILED-Egg (TPSA / MolLogP), structure-based
